title: Amtech E2540 Knife Blade Sharpener
features: RAZOR SHARP EDGES: This knife blade sharpener has crossed carbide blades to provide quick edge setting and crossed ceramic rods to provide a razor sharp edge
VERSATILE: Ideal for sharpening knives and scissors, they are not suitable for blades with serrated edges
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x Knife blade sharpener See more
